data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for candidate-controlled discoverability toggles.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Candidate-controlled discoverability toggles', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm or deny the existence of these toggles. As a result, the validation cannot be completed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation of 'Candidate-controlled discoverability toggles'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
